title: Run Linux firmware gates for link migration
description: Scope: validate only the recovered Schnorr-48/link-wire migration on Linux Zephyr after project-LICHEN-2auf.56; do not absorb general subsystem or board-matrix rows. In account 210337117346 with AWS_PROFILE=personal, AWS_REGION=us-west-2, launch an owned Project=LICHEN builder in us-west-2c and attach only approved EBS vol-0a95eee8d1d8461eb at /mnt/lichen-zephyr. Create a clean worktree from the recorded base commit, apply only the recorded integration commit/patch, and hash both source and patch. Run link_crypto on native_sim/native/64, focused puck/L2 and kiss_transport Zephyr tests, and the declared bridge-esp32, bridge-rust, and bridge-stm32wl link-migration build checks. This bead exclusively owns those gates; project-LICHEN-2auf.59 must not repeat them.
design: Use the EBS-pinned Zephyr workspace/SDK and `tools/zephyr-clean-worktree.sh` where declared. Before each row record the full command, cwd, environment overrides, git base/HEAD/diff hash, west manifest revision, Zephyr/SDK/compiler/tool versions, UTC start/end, exit code, and stdout/stderr log path and SHA-256. A missing target, unsupported alias, test skip, ignored warning/error, stale artifact, dirty-worktree verification failure, or nonzero command is a row failure; do not modify or weaken tests to pass. Cleanup follows .56: collect/hash logs first, sync, verify mount users, unmount /mnt/lichen-zephyr, ownership-check instance and exact volume, detach vol-0a95eee8d1d8461eb, wait with `aws ec2 wait volume-available`, then terminate only the recorded RunId instance after tag/account recheck.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Account query proves 210337117346 under profile personal in us-west-2 before writes; builder and volume are in us-west-2c and exact volume ID/Name/state checks pass. 2. Clean base commit plus link patch/commit provenance is recorded and artifact/log hashes match that source. 3. link_crypto native_sim/native/64 builds and runs; focused puck/L2 and kiss_transport tests build and run; declared bridge-esp32, bridge-rust, and bridge-stm32wl checks all pass without silently reducing features or targets. 4. Every command and exit status is retained in hashed UTC logs; no skipped or ignored failure is accepted. 5. Clean-worktree verification passes after every row. 6. Logs are collected before ownership-checked cleanup; EBS unmount, detach, and wait-available all succeed explicitly. Close .35.4/.35.5 only after every applicable link row and cleanup step passes.
notes: Link migration validation gates (link_crypto native_sim/native/64, puck/L2, kiss_transport, bridge-esp32/rust/stm32wl) require clean worktree from recorded base, specific patch application, full provenance/evidence per .59/.56 design (hashes, logs, unmount/detach/wait/terminate). Current session on wip/checkpoint-20260715 (103 ahead). No untagged AWS launches. HUMAN tagged for decision on exact base commit/patch or local-only test execution to close.
